notes: Wiki page is redirect-only. No infobox. No existing graph node.
Type assigned concept.custom — the trial of seven is a cultural/legal practice, not an individual event. Each specific trial is an event.battle; the practice itself is the concept.

Multi-type flag: the trial-of-seven could also map to concept.custom (legal rite) or event.battle (for specific instances). Treating the slug as the practice-concept is consistent with architecture.md concept.custom definition.
